title: indigofera microscypha
intro: Indigofera microscypha, also known as the small-leaved indigo, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Indigofera microscypha include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Indigofera microscypha include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other medicinal products.
